title: The Ark Maxim Is Revealed
description: Enel’s game keeps removing fighters from the board, leaving only a few survivors scattered across Upper Yard.
scene: Across pages 12, 13, 14, 15, this scene centers on Enel, Gan Fall, Nami, Sanji, Eneru. Enel’s game keeps removing fighters from the board, leaving only a few survivors scattered across Upper Yard.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Even if you get to God's shrine...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Damn bastard! What are you doing here....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: I just visited the God's shrine....!!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Of course, enel was nowhere in sight.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: I'm just here to say goodbye.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: What are you planning to do, ohm!!?

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: I will have to eliminate you!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Where are the Holy GUARDSmen? Tell me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: What's up with this stupid cave <~!!?

summary: Enel’s game keeps removing fighters from the board, leaving only a few survivors scattered across Upper Yard.
